scene_input.scene_summary: Surāqah tells his tribe that he has seen the Prophet's group chasing a stray camel.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Surāqah pointing towards a distant camel

schema_output.scene_summary: Surāqah tells his tribe that he has seen the Prophet's group chasing a stray camel.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 119

characters.name: Surāqah ibn Mālik
characters.appearance: medium build, wearing a simple brown woolen cloak and a white cloth head covering, with a rugged, weathered face and a serious expression

characters.name: The Prophet's tribe
characters.appearance: various ages and builds, wearing traditional Arabian clothing, some with veiled faces, others with curious expressions

schema_output.narrative_text: Surāqah told his tribe that he had seen a group of people chasing a stray camel. He thought it was the Habash. When he asked them, they said no, and he realized they were the Prophet's group.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast, arid desert landscape with endless dunes stretching towards the horizon, under a clear blue sky with a few wispy clouds. Late afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the sandy terrain. In the distance, a group of people in traditional Arabian clothing, led by the central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle reassuring gesture. On the right, a young woman wearing a simple brown woolen cloak and a white cloth head covering, standing with her legs apart, pointing towards the distant camel with a serious expression. Soft warm golden light, vast and open mood. Medium shot from a slight elevation. Warm beige, sandy, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
